raw_consumer_statement:
I have been dealing with Citibank since XXXX on unauthorized fraudulent charges related to an account. 

To many phone calls and written requests to mention. I have been jerked around and left wondering how to resolve this very disturbing issue with Citibank. Fraud should be taken seriously and it does not feel that Citi takes it seriously at all. 

Here is my latest letter to Citi sent via email on XXXX XXXX to XXXX XXXX at Citi ( they never respond but this is my latest attempt to get someone to please help ) : Good afternoon, RE : account number : XXXX ( last 4 digits XXXX XXXX  ( previous account number ) I recently spoke to XXXX on the Citi Investigation team, on XX/XX/XXXX, around XXXX EST. I requested yet again that all charges related to account number above be disputed. Attached ( and below ) are a series of screen captures of the actual statement charges, reflecting the dates, location, charges. I finally received a copy of these from Citibank after months of asking. 
I did not make any of these charges, or payments. It appears that all charges originated in West Virginia or Ohio, and I have never been to XXXX XXXX or Ohio in my life. These are all fraudulent charges, which I am disputing. I am also disputing the late charges that were applied to this account. 
Citibank would need to show that these charges were indeed made by me, either with my signature, an IP address connected to me, receipts, etc.. This is not possible since I made none of the charges. 
I am requesting, in writing, that these charges be reversed with a statement that I am not responsible for any of the charges on this account. I would also appreciate the credit bureaus ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX be informed as soon as this is resolved that this was resolved in my favor or shown to be fraudulent, since Citi has reported this account as past due and late and it has ruined my credit rating.through no fault of my own. To be clear : we are not disputing that this account may be in my name or belong to me, but that all of the charges are fraudulent and not my responsibility.
